# Onboarding: C++ Skill
This guide helps you write, lint, and debug modern C++ code.
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for RAII, smart pointers, and error handling.
2. Use tools/ for linting or static analysis (e.g. clang-tidy, cppcheck).
3. See examples/README.md for code skeletons and patterns.
## Troubleshooting
- **Build fails?**
- Check for missing headers and template errors.
## Resources
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md)
- [examples/README.md](examples/README.md)
- [tools/](tools/)
